name: yneko-reimu
description: WordPress classic hybrid port of hexo-theme-reimu.

scripts.build: npm run i18n && node tools/build-lily-cursor.mjs && vite build && node tools/build-reimu.mjs
scripts.check:js: node --check theme/Yneko-Reimu/assets/src/reimu.js && node --check tools/build-reimu.mjs && node --check tools/build-lily-cursor.mjs && node --check tools/build-i18n.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run build && npm run lint:php
